titleStmt.title: SII 6.642: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 642. (A.R. No. 196 of 1899). ON THE SAME WALL; SECOND TIER.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namŇć varńĀharŇępńĀya viŇõvarŇępńĀya viŠĻ£ŠĻáavńď . bhŇęrmmustńďva saŇõailńĀbdiryyaddaŠĻĀŠĻ£rńĀyńĀŠĻĀ virńĀjatńď . 1 yasya ŇõrńęparamńďŇõvarasya vipulńĀ ŇõrńępńĀdapadmadvayńď bhaktiryyŇć bhuviguŠĻĀŠłćenńĀryyahridayasyńĀnaŠĻĀdadŇć naŠĻĀdanaŠł• . kuppńĀ
mukhavarttikńęrttiniratassanmńĀnadńĀnńĀkaraŠł• (.) ŇõrńęmadguŠĻĀŠłćimaŠłćńĀbhidhńĀna vibudhagrńĀmńĀdhipassatyavńĀgdharmmatyńĀgadayńĀdisadguŠĻáadhanairńĀkńęrnnacńďtŇćgrihaŠł• dhńęmńĀnkńĀŇõyapagŇćtravarddhanakarassńĀhityavidyńĀttadhńęŠł• AnnńĀkhyassukavńęŠĻĀdra
tńď kammakŠĻ£amńĀmaŠĻĀŠłćalńď ŇõrńęmatyńĀptaŇõubhŇćttarńĀyanadinńď kuppńĀŠĻĀbikńĀnaŠĻĀdanaŠł• prńĀdńĀdannayanńĀmavńĀnguŠĻáanidhiŠł• ŇõrńękńďŇõavasyńĀlayńď dńępaŠĻĀ ppńĀpatamaŠł•prahńĀraminabhŇęcaŠĻĀdradyutńĀrasthiraŠĻĀ . ŇõrńęmanmahńĀmaŠĻĀŠłćalńďŇõvara Ňõrńę
dńďvara kakhaŠĻĀŠłćavarttidńępamunakuŠĻĀ beŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ina mńďŠĻĀka 55 vńęniŠĻĀ jńďkoni raŠłćŠłćamunannebŇćyuŠĻĀŠłću tana putrńĀnupautrika mńĀcaŠĻĀdrńĀrkkamu nitya mńĀneŠĻĀŠłću neyi vŇćyaŠĻĀggalavńĀŠĻĀŠłću . svadattaŠĻĀ paradattaŠĻĀ vńĀ yŇć harńďti vasu
Digital edition of SII 6.642 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
